message:
fix: card fullscreen rendering, inline insertion, WASD guard, and prepend-on-add (#3273)

- Fix 5 llm-d cards (LLMdFlow, EPPRouting, KVCacheMonitor, PDDisaggregation,
  LLMdAIInsights) to properly fill fullscreen modals with wider viewBox, scaled
  node positions, and expanded grid layouts
- Add min-h to BaseModal xl/full sizes so expanded cards fill the viewport
- Add WASD input guard to 4 game cards (KubeBert, KubeCraft3D, KubePong,
  PodPitfall) so keyboard input doesn't get captured in search fields
- New cards now prepend to the top of the dashboard instead of appending
- Add inline card insertion: hover any card to see + buttons on left/right
  edges that open the Add Card modal and insert at that position. Works on
  all 4 dashboard rendering paths (Dashboard, DashboardRuntime, DashboardPage,
  CustomDashboard)

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
